name: slidemax-workflow
description: Use when generating PPT, XHS, story, or related canvas outputs with this repository, or when maintaining workflow-facing assets under skills/slidemax_workflow that depend on the repository-specific stage order, role handoffs, command surface, and project structure rules.

triggers: Generate PPT, XHS, story, or related canvas outputs
Explain or execute the repository workflow stages
Modify workflow-facing roles, commands, docs, or examples
Audit repository-specific workflow reliability or handoff quality
do_not_use_when: The task is unrelated to the SlideMax workflow
A narrower skill can solve the task without repository workflow context

capabilities: Route users into the canonical PPT workflow
Normalize source inputs before strategy work begins
Coordinate role handoffs across Strategist, Image_Generator, and Executor
Point agents to canonical commands and workflow documents
Define the repository-specific delivery and validation path
constraints: This skill is the only canonical workflow source for PPT workflow tasks in the repository
Agents must read AGENTS.md and the generate-ppt workflow before executing workflow tasks
Workflow-facing changes should stay under skills/slidemax_workflow
